privileged_info_summary: No metadata field found in task.json. Task uses synthetic data created by setup_task.sh containing 8 vaccination records for 3 pets (Max, Bella, Whiskers) across 4 vaccine types (Rabies, DHPP, Bordetella, FVRCP). Data includes vaccination dates ranging from 2021-03-15 to 2024-01-10, with booster intervals of 1 or 3 years. As of 2026-03-07, 6 out of 8 vaccines would be overdue. Task requires adding formulas to column E (Next Due Date) and column F (Status), plus conditional formatting for OVERDUE cells.
